test_cases.scenario: S1: Claude (image-capable) tool sends image via sendMessageWithImage
test_cases.evidence: ClaudeTool implements IImageCapableCLITool with supportsImage()=>true and sendMessageWithImage() appending markdown image reference. isImageCapableCLITool type guard returns true for ClaudeTool. Integration test api-send-cli-tool.test.ts confirms send route dispatches correctly.

test_cases.scenario: S2: Non-image-capable tools use fallback path embedding
test_cases.evidence: send/route.ts lines 217-222: when imagePath is provided but tool lacks image support, message is sent as `${content}\n\n[attached image: ${absoluteImagePath}]`. CodexTool/GeminiTool do not implement supportsImage, so isImageCapableCLITool returns false (unit test types.test.ts line 65-80).

test_cases.scenario: S3: Supported image formats (png/jpg/jpeg/gif/webp) validated correctly
test_cases.evidence: ATTACHABLE_IMAGE_EXTENSIONS contains exactly [.png, .jpg, .jpeg, .gif, .webp]. Unit test image-extensions-attachment.test.ts (7 tests passed) verifies this.

test_cases.scenario: S4: Unsupported format (svg) rejected by validation
test_cases.evidence: ATTACHABLE_IMAGE_EXTENSIONS explicitly filters out .svg. useImageAttachment hook validateFile() rejects files not in ATTACHABLE_IMAGE_EXTENSIONS. Unit test useImageAttachment.test.ts 'should reject unsupported file formats' confirms SVG rejection.

test_cases.scenario: S5: Files exceeding 5MB size limit rejected
test_cases.evidence: IMAGE_MAX_SIZE_BYTES = 5*1024*1024. useImageAttachment hook validateFile() checks file.size > IMAGE_MAX_SIZE_BYTES. Unit test useImageAttachment.test.ts 'should reject files exceeding size limit' creates a file of IMAGE_MAX_SIZE_BYTES+1 and confirms rejection.

test_cases.scenario: S6: Existing text-only sendMessage not broken
test_cases.evidence: sendMessage API signature changed 3rd arg from CLIToolType to options object {cliToolId?, imagePath?}. Without imagePath, send/route.ts line 223 calls cliTool.sendMessage(id, content) unchanged. Integration test 'should use claude tool by default' passes with text-only message. All 4921 unit tests pass.

test_cases.scenario: S7: IImageCapableCLITool type guard functions correctly
test_cases.evidence: isImageCapableCLITool checks typeof supportsImage === 'function' && supportsImage() === true. Unit test types.test.ts verifies: returns true for image-capable mock, false for regular tool, false when supportsImage returns false. 4 dedicated test cases passed.

test_cases.scenario: S8: Security validation (SSRF, path traversal, whitelist) functions correctly
test_cases.evidence: Integration test api-send-cli-tool.test.ts 'Image path validation (Issue #474)': rejects file://, http://, https://, ftp://, data: schemes (400); rejects ../../../etc/passwd traversal (400); rejects paths outside .commandmate/attachments/ (400). All 3 security tests passed.

test_cases.scenario: S9: ATTACHABLE_IMAGE_EXTENSIONS does not contain SVG
test_cases.evidence: Unit test image-extensions-attachment.test.ts 'should not include .svg (XSS prevention)' explicitly asserts ATTACHABLE_IMAGE_EXTENSIONS does not contain '.svg'. Test passed.

test_cases.scenario: S10: uploadImageFile uses FormData for upload
test_cases.evidence: api-client.ts uploadImageFile() creates FormData, appends file with timestamped filename, POSTs to /api/worktrees/${worktreeId}/upload/.commandmate/attachments. Upload API route at src/app/api/worktrees/[id]/upload/[...path]/route.ts handles multipart upload with auto-directory creation.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: 画像対応CLIツールで画像ファイルを添付してメッセージ送信できること
CLIツール固有の画像送信方式がある場合はそれに準拠すること
固有方式がない場合はアップロードした画像のファイルパスをメッセージに含めて送信できること
画像非対応ツールでは添付ボタンが非表示または無効化されていること
対応画像形式（png, jpg, jpeg, gif, webp）のバリデーションが機能すること
画像ファイルサイズ上限（5MB）のバリデーションが機能すること
既存のメッセージ送信機能（テキストのみ）が壊れないこと
主要ロジックのユニットテストが追加されていること

message: すべての受入条件を満たしています。全10テストシナリオがPASSED。ユニットテスト4921件全件パス、TypeScriptエラー0件、ESLintエラー0件。
